title: Mr. 5 Hunts the Princess
description: On pages 12–15, mr. 5 hunts the princess as baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase.
scene: Mr. 5 Hunts the Princess. Baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Be careful not to let your sword get chipped!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's wrong, too scared to move?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What happened to your acrobatic finesse?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Oh I'll show it to you alright!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Just be sure to keep your eyes open!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now... gaze deeply at my body... :)

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: If you want someone competent, then look no further! Prepare yourself, Mr. Bushido!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 5 hunts the princess. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
